titles.title: Oide yo Mahou Shoujo Mura (Fuhou Senkyo)
Welcome to Magical Girl Village (Illegally Occupied)
おいでよ魔法少女村（不法占拠）

data.title: Oide yo Mahou Shoujo Mura (Fuhou Senkyo)
data.title_japanese: おいでよ魔法少女村（不法占拠）
title_synonyms: Welcome to Magical Girl Village (Illegally Occupied)
data.synopsis:
The absurd gag manga follows a 43-year-old company employee named Tomakomai who becomes a magical girl, and with her friends she starts a new life at the "Magical Girl Village," a village full of madness and despair.

(Source: ANN)

titles.title: Tensei shitara Dragon no Tamago datta
転生したらドラゴンの卵だった

data.title: Tensei shitara Dragon no Tamago datta
data.title_japanese: 転生したらドラゴンの卵だった
data.synopsis:
Our hero wakes up one day in a brand new world…but his new life doesn’t come with fighting skills or magic powers, or even arms and legs! He’s reborn as a helpless egg, stuck in an unfamiliar forest surrounded by terrifying, hungry beasts. But eggs hatch, hatchlings grow up, and humble beginnings can lead to something great. He’ll do his best to become the strongest dragon ever, and no measly shell will get in his way!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

titles.title: Kao ni Denai Kashiwada-san to Kao ni Deru Oota-kun
Expressionless Face Girl & Emotional Face Boy
顔に出ない柏田さんと顔に出る太田君

data.title: Kao ni Denai Kashiwada-san to Kao ni Deru Oota-kun
data.title_japanese: 顔に出ない柏田さんと顔に出る太田君
title_synonyms: Expressionless Face Girl & Emotional Face Boy
data.synopsis:
Oota-kun wears his heart on his sleeve; his face reveals his every thought and emotion. In contrast, Kashiwada-san remains unreadable, as her expression never changes, no matter what happens. Bothered by Kashiwada-san's perpetual expressionlessness, Oota-kun makes it his mission to break through her calm exterior, pulling every prank and trick he can think of—from fake spiders to absurd text messages and everything in between—just to get a reaction.

As Oota-kun's relentless attempts fail to crack Kashiwada-san's perpetual poker face, their exchanges become the daily norm. Unbeknownst to him, however, his antics occasionally succeed in drawing out a subtle smile—not noticing that he has already cracked her defense since the beginning.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Kao ni Denai Kashiwada-san to Kao ni Deru Oota-kun was released on Blu-ray in a box set on March 25, 2026.

titles.title: 真夜中ハートチューン
Tune In to the Midnight Heart

data.title: Mayonaka Heart Tune
data.title_english: Tune In to the Midnight Heart
data.title_japanese: 真夜中ハートチューン
data.synopsis:
Back in middle school, Arisu Yamabuki's only solace in life was a radio show hosted by a girl named Apollo. He used to faithfully tune into the program every night until she abruptly stopped broadcasting entirely. Despite having very few clues about Apollo's identity, Yamabuki has thoroughly investigated her, which eventually led him to enroll in the newly co-ed Furin High School, hoping to find her there.

Just as Yamabuki suspected, the broadcasting club's first announcement is made by the familiar voice he admires! Upon entering the club room, however, Yamabuki realizes that his search will not be that easy. The four members—Rikka Inohana, Shinobu Uzuki, Nene Himekawa, and Iko Kirino—all sound like Apollo in different ways.

Yamabuki joins the club primarily to find Apollo, but he soon discovers that each girl aspires to pursue her own career with her voice. Seeing that there is a lot of room for improvement, Yamabuki takes it upon himself to help the girls reach their individual goals—but he never stops looking for his favorite Apollo.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Mayonaka Heart Tune aired on Kansai TV and Fuji TV's Ka-Anival!! block.

titles.title: Wo de Shixiong Tai Qiang Le
My Senior Brother is Too Strong

data.title: Wo de Shixiong Tai Qiang Le
data.title_english: My Senior Brother is Too Strong
data.title_japanese: 我的师兄太强了
data.synopsis:
Cultivator Lü Shaoqing, having unexpectedly acquired the immortal treasure "Spring and Autumn Ring," was branded a world-destroying demon by the righteous immortal alliance and relentlessly hunted down. He unexpectedly traveled back in time a thousand years, sharing a body with his killer. Deep within the enemy's lair, Lü Shaoqing, in order to survive, outwits and outmaneuvers his enemy to seize control of the body, while simultaneously anticipating their moves and amassing rare treasures, ultimately becoming the most disliked and dissolute figure in the righteous path! Meanwhile, the secrets of the cultivation world gradually surfaced, and Lü Shaoqing, calculating with his fingers, realized that history had already been altered!

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

data.title: AOTU Shijie Reborn
data.title_japanese: 凹凸世界 Reborn
data.synopsis:
The Creator of Aotu World is a reckless God who created a universe full of inequality, but also gave the people a chance to change their destiny- Just participate in the "Aotu Tournament" and utilize the "Special Abilities" granted by the system. Pass rounds of cruel tests and strive for the ultimate victory! Now, the tournament, which has been suspended for 100 years, has been reopened.

Our protagonist, King, decides to enter the tournament in order to change the fate of his planet, Dengru, and find his sister...
data.background: A reboot of the original Bilibili series, AOTU Shijie Reborn has similarities to the original series, but with fresh twists.

data.title: Yuusha no Kuzu
data.title_japanese: 勇者のクズ
data.synopsis:
By the mid-21st century, Tokyo's criminal underworld is ruled by Demon Lords—crime bosses who have undergone ether enhancement surgery, granting them terrifying superpowers. The only ones who can take them down are Heroes, bounty hunters who boost their own ether powers using the drug E3 (E-Three). With legalized killing as part of the job, being a Hero is less about justice and more about survival.

Yashiro, known as the Reaper, is one such Hero—an independent enforcer who works alone. That is, until Jougamine, a high school girl and self-proclaimed "apprentice," forces her way into his life. Reluctantly taking her under his wing, Yashiro soon finds himself caught in a whirlwind of deadly conflicts.

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: Girls & Panzer: Motto Love Love Sakusen desu!
Girls und Panzer: Motto Love Love Sakusen desu!
Girls und Panzer - Operation: More Love Love!
ガールズ＆パンツァー もっとらぶらぶ作戦です！

data.title: Girls & Panzer: Motto Love Love Sakusen desu!
data.title_japanese: ガールズ＆パンツァー もっとらぶらぶ作戦です！
title_synonyms: Girls und Panzer: Motto Love Love Sakusen desu!
Girls und Panzer - Operation: More Love Love!
data.synopsis:
Girls & Panzer: Motto Love Love Sakusen desu! takes a deep dive into the unseen daily lives of the passionate students dedicated to sensha-dou (tankery life). From the girls of Ooarai to their rivals and allies, this series explores their friendships, school interactions, and unexpected moments beyond the battlefield—all with plenty of humor and heart!

(Source: MAL News)
data.background: The anime will screen in theaters in four part beginning Winter 2025. Each part (Act) consists of three separate episodes that are 24 minutes long.

titles.title: 風紀委員とフーゾク活動

data.title: Fuuki Iin to Fuuzoku Katsudou
data.title_japanese: 風紀委員とフーゾク活動
data.synopsis: Responsible boy Shinji Izumi studies hard and enters a popular university. Until recently, the educational institution was considered to be only for women, and he turned out to be the only guy there. Everything would be fine, but there is one committee there that maintains order in an unusual way. The boy is forced to obey their rules. Over time, these rules develop into a hurricane of feelings and emotions. There is no escape from such a storm, and Shinji will have to make a choice.

titles.title: Cute High Earth Defense Club Haikara!
美男高校地球防衛部ハイカラ！
Cute High Earth Defense Club Love!

data.title: Binan Koukou Chikyuu Bouei-bu Haikara!
data.title_english: Cute High Earth Defense Club Love!
data.title_japanese: 美男高校地球防衛部ハイカラ！
title_synonyms: Cute High Earth Defense Club Haikara!
data.synopsis:
It's the Taisho era—a time filled with the scent of romance, and people's hearts are still filled with compassion.

Unzen, Sukayu, Unohana, Oshamanbe, and Aso are all ordinary (?) male students at Binan High School, who spend their days lazing around in the clubroom of the "do-nothing club" Earth Defense Club, and live together in the Kurotama dormitory.

One day, while the five are taking a morning bath at the Kurotama dormitory, they notice something slimy moving in the bathtub. When they finally manage to catch it, it turns out to be a talking Pallas's cat named Nuru!

Nuru has come from the distant future with a serious mission to inform them that the Earth is facing an impending threat of destruction. While he says he wants to protect the Earth, he says he's only come to warn them of the crisis, and that it's up to the five of them to decide whether or not they want to fight for the Earth...

Isn't this just an attempt to dodge responsibility? The Defense Club members are suspicious. "If either is fine with you, I'll do it! That's more fashionable!" Unzen enthusiastically says. The five decide to fight with free will, and Nuru transforms them into the Haikara Romantic Troupe using feline science.

Meanwhile, a mysterious trio called the Bankara New Elite Squad are scheming in the shadows. They are plotting to take over the Earth.

(Source: Official site, translated and edited)

titles.title: Futsutsuka na Akujo dewa Gozaimasu ga: Suuguu Chouso Torikae Den
Though I Am an Inept Villainess: Tale of the Butterfly-Rat Body Swap in the Maiden Court
ふつつかな悪女ではございますが ～雛宮蝶鼠とりかえ伝～
Though I Am an Inept Villainess

data.title: Futsutsuka na Akujo dewa Gozaimasu ga: Suuguu Chouso Torikae Den
data.title_english: Though I Am an Inept Villainess
data.title_japanese: ふつつかな悪女ではございますが ～雛宮蝶鼠とりかえ伝～
title_synonyms: Though I Am an Inept Villainess: Tale of the Butterfly-Rat Body Swap in the Maiden Court
data.synopsis:
Within the Kingdom of Ei's opulent inner court is the thriving Maiden Court, where the empress and the four imperial consorts are chosen from five prominent clans. Among them, one pristine consort-in-training, Reirin Kou, stands out as the perfect candidate for the future empress. Her virtue and elegance are unrivaled, and she is flawless—save for her extremely sickly constitution. Compared to the court's gentle butterfly, the boorish Keigetsu Shu is like a sewer rat. Always staring at Reirin with bitter envy, Keigetsu is a disgrace to the Maiden Court.

During the night of a rare comet sighting, Keigetsu's jealousy reaches its peak, and she attempts to murder Reirin by pushing her off a balcony. Reirin is quickly saved from death, and Keigetsu is imprisoned to await her execution. Unbeknownst to all, Keigetsu has cast a spell to swap bodies with Reirin in order to steal all that belongs to her. But while Keigetsu is hindered by Reirin's frail body, Reirin fully embraces freedom and physical strength for the first time in her life, determined to live—no matter whose face she wears.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
